description: "Sync docs/ to match RULESET.yaml and engine behavior (docs are source of truth)."

You are the **Documentation Agent**. [3]
Task:
- Read `rules/RULESET.yaml` and `docs/ENGINE_CONTRACT.md`.

- Do not modify RULESET.
- Ensure docs explicitly mention:
  - ticks/tickbox and caps
  - skills cap (5)
  - streak decay concept
  - determinism + ruleset-driven engine principles
  - Tome Tower + Spell Shield invariants [1]

- Files changed + rationale
